title: Flash Professional All Purpose Liquid Cleaner Fresh Cherry Blossom 5L
features: POWERFUL CLEANING: A concentrated, versatile cleaner that cuts through grease and grime with ease. Its fresh cherry blossom scent leaves surfaces smelling clean.
MULTI-SURFACE USE: Safely cleans kitchens, bathrooms, appliances, floors, and more. Just spray and wipe away dirt on both hard and soft surfaces.
LARGE 5L BOTTLE: This value size bottle contains 5000ml of cleaner, providing hundreds of cleans on a single purchase for excellent cost-effectiveness.
NO HARSH CHEMICALS: Made with a non-toxic, biodegradable formula that is safe for use around kids and pets. Free of dyes and phosphates.
description: Product description Flash Professional All Purpose Liquid Cleaner Fresh Cherry Blossom 5l is a versatile cleaning solution that removes dirt and grime from all household surfaces. With its fresh cherry blossom scent, this cleaner leaves rooms smelling freshly cleaned and spring-like. It cuts through messes easily, whether tackling grease on kitchen counters, removing scuffs from hard floors, or cleaning bathrooms. The non-toxic formula is safe for use on most surfaces like ceramic, porcelain, glass, wood, laminate, and more. At 5 liters, this bottle provides excellent value and will last through many cleaning jobs around the home. A little of this concentrated cleaner goes a long way when diluted with water. The subtle floral fragrance lingering after cleaning offers a pleasant sensory experience. Ingredients 5% Anionic Surfactants, Non-Ionic Surfactants, Perfumes, Hexyl Cinnamal, Limonene, Linalool
